title: helichrysum swynnertonii
intro: Helichrysum swynnertonii, also known as the Socotra helichrysum, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to the Socotra Islands in Yemen. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are said to exhibit antiseptic and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum swynnertonii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant is typically prepared as an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, or as a tincture, which can be consumed orally, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
